description: Inspired by pretty women and femininity, this fastrack watch refuses to conform, with its stylish dial. Minimalist design, quadrilateral face and a black synthetic leather strap with orange stitch detailing, to give it a modern feel backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and casual sandals or shoes. Case diameter: 23 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Quadrilateral Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Synthetic leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Black and orange dial with branding between the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 5 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
